m01.question: Day 1: What is the main decision in "Monetization as a player-value loop"?
options: Decide what the game is allowed to monetize before adding SDKs or offers.
Add every available ad format before measuring retention

Delay tracking until after the first paid traffic test
m01.explanation: The course treats monetization as a testable value exchange with metrics and rollback rules.
